  +------------------------------+
  |                              |
  |     +----------+             |
  |     |  Node D  |             |
  |     +----------+             |
  |           ^                  |
  |           |                  |
  |         +-+-------+          |
  |         |         |          |
  |         |         |          |
  |         |   +-----+----+     |
  |         |   |  Node C  |     |
  |         |   +----------+     |
  |         |         ^          |
  |         |         |          |
  |         |         |          |
  |  Right Group      |          |
  +-------------------o----------+
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
            |         |
+-----------o---------o--------+
|           |         |        |
|           |         |        |
|           |         |        |
|     +-----+----+    |        |
|     |  Node B  |    |        |
|     +----------+    |        |
|           ^         |        |
|           |         |        |
|           |         |        |
|           |         |        |
|           |         |        |
|           +-------+-+        |
|                   |          |
|             +-----+----+     |
|             |  Node A  |     |
|             +----------+     |
|                              |
|  Left Group                  |
+------------------------------+
